properties.description: CC-FW-033-T1071 Conexión bloqueada saliente contra IP maliciosa
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "AZUREFIREWALLS"
| where Category == "AZFWThreatIntel"
| where Action_s != "Alert"
| summarize startTime=min(TimeGenerated), endTime=max(TimeGenerated), EventCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIp_s, ThreatDescription_s, Action_s
properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] CC-FW-033-T1071 Conexión bloqueada saliente contra IP maliciosa
